title: Silky Russian Olive Salad
description: A buttery, silky salad that energizes any meal with black olives, fresh herbs, and a creamy dressing, all kosher-friendly.
instructions: Warm the butter and olive oil in a small saucepan over low heat until the butter melts.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let the mixture cool slightly.
In a large bowl, combine the black olives, sliced red onion, halved cherry tomatoes, chopped dill, and chopped parsley.
Whisk the lemon juice, minced garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Add the warm butter‑oil mixture to the bowl and stir until the vegetables are coated.
Pour the lemon‑garlic dressing over the salad and toss gently to combine.
Taste the salad and adjust seasoning with more salt or pepper if desired.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, garnished with extra dill or parsley if desired.
